purpose: Turn full Fallout: New Vegas parity into a data-driven crawl with explicit denominators, runtime evidence classes, and no staged/fake gameplay credit.

normalRunRule.creditRule: A feature gets observed credit only when loaded from the normal FNV profile/save/start path and exercised through OpenMW runtime systems. It gets accepted credit only after the per-feature retail contract and regression gates pass.

requiredEvidence: normal flat launch
cell entered through normal streaming or authored teleport
screenshot/pixel sanity
no fatal resource or shader-alpha regression
actor loaded by CELL/ACHR/ACRE data
enabled state and enable parent honored
grounded transform and facing sanity
skeleton and visible rig topology pass
idle/wander/combat animation group advances
equipment/animobject attachment uses authored records
topic/INFO selected from ESM4 dialogue conditions
response text, voice, and LIP resolve from authored data where present
result script transitions such as ShowBarterMenu execute
merchant inventory/caps rows come from actor/container/item records
container opened in game
rows sourced from ContainerStore/runtime references
take/store mutation persists through save/load
icons/text remain legible and non-placeholder when assets exist

crawlGates.denominator: WEAP + AMMO + weapon-mod items + equipped weapon save extras
requiredEvidence: weapon rows, condition, ammo selection, hotkey/equip state, and item cards are sourced from WEAP/AMMO/save runtime data
weapon mod install/remove/eligibility uses authored weapon-mod records and changes model/stat/runtime state
ammo type switching validates weapon compatibility including FormIdList ammo groups and persists through save/load
firing consumes the selected ammo stack and updates HUD/Pip-Boy counts
condition loss changes weapon value/damage/jam behavior and persists
repair by compatible item, repair kit, and vendor service uses authored skill/perk/service/caps rules
all visual attachments, projectile helpers, reload/jam/fire sounds, impacts, hit reactions, corpse loot, and XP are proven through normal in-game combat

currentStatus.ammoSelectionSaveData: implemented evidence exists in InventoryStore/FNV save preflight paths
currentStatus.weaponFireAmmoConsumption: bounded combat proof exists, not exhaustive

requiredEvidence: station activation is by normal raycast/use on authored ACTI references
Workbench, Reloading Bench, and Campfire categories are selected from authored RCCT/RCPE/script links
recipe list, requirements, ingredient counts, skill/perk/condition checks, blocked states, selection, confirmation, sounds, animation, and messages match retail
ingredient consumption and output creation mutate the live player inventory atomically
ammo breakdown/hand-load recipes create the exact authored AMMO outputs and byproducts
crafted weapons/armor/aid/misc outputs have correct condition, ownership, icons, stats, effects, and save/load persistence
all 291 recipes are classified; every unsupported CTDA/item-kind/script blocker is explicit and tracked until implemented

currentStatus.recipeParser: 291/291 live official RCPE records parsed/stored in focused tests
currentStatus.stationActivation: Workbench and Reloading Bench bounded activation exists

crawlGates.denominator: WEAP + BPTD actor body parts + Player actor value 12
requiredEvidence: retail trace records entry/exit, target identity, limb identity, displayed hit chance, AP before/after, queue order, ammo before/after, damage, and kill state
weapon AP override, base VATS chance, skill actor value, limb damage multiplier, projectile, ammo use, and damage come from winning WEAP records
target limbs and severability come from the actor's authored BPTD/race data
Player action points use native Fallout actor value 12 and persist through save/load without borrowing Morrowind fatigue
queued attacks execute through the normal Fallout weapon path so ammo, condition, sounds, projectiles, impacts, hostility, death, loot, and XP remain shared
retail and OpenMW before/after ledgers account for every changed byte or explicitly mark an uncovered mapping

currentStatus.actionPointsRuntimeState: implemented with save/load roundtrip and retail Save 330 zero-modifier byte trace

requiredEvidence: door activation through normal raycast/activation
destination cell preload completes before activation
actors/interactables reload after return
no cell transition hitch beyond configured threshold
quest objective/stage rows sourced from ESM4QuestRuntime
dialogue/result/script mutation changes runtime state
notification and Pip-Boy DATA panes update
state survives save/load
region/climate/weather selected from authored records
sky/cloud/fog/light values logged from runtime data
distant geometry and alpha/material sanity pass
sound resolves from Fallout data, not Morrowind fallback, except shared UI bootstrap assets explicitly listed

openIssues: authored fog/light parameters are not yet emitted as proof
audit furniture regex was stale and has been updated to current seated lifecycle proof
process exited with access violation before summary
gecko visibility/topology gate emitted visibleDrawables=0 before crash

nextSlicesInOrder: Make Goodsprings interaction audit pass without weakening fog proof by adding real authored fog/light telemetry.
Fix gecko creature visible rig topology/crash so the 11-target Goodsprings actor audit completes.
Run a flat normal-game inventory/equipment slice that equips weapons, switches ammo, fires, observes HUD/Pip-Boy count deltas, and save-loads the result.
Capture a retail VATS before/after ledger, then implement target limbs, hit chance, queueing, AP spend, and shared weapon execution without inferred fallbacks.
Implement/prove weapon mod installation and repair/condition services from authored records; no proof-only item injection gets parity credit.
Run Workbench, Reloading Bench, and Campfire normal activation slices; classify all 291 recipes and promote only real inventory mutation plus save/load evidence.
Generate shard manifests for every cell with actors/interactables and every directed door teleport.
Run flat background shards by connected region; promote only runs with real cell streaming, actor/dialogue/container evidence, and no synthetic content.
Only after flat crawl is stable, rerun representative VR slices for Mads pointer/hands/menu placement compatibility.
